title: IT System Administrator
description:
Key Responsibilities:

  • Design, develop, and implement IT policies and procedures to ensure data accuracy, security, and compliance with regulations.
  • Evaluate and address business requirements, considering outsourcing versus in-house solutions and developing partnerships with IT suppliers and vendors.
  • Provide technical support and back-up during incidents, ensuring timely resolution.
  • Translate business needs into system solutions to ensure the long-term supportability of IT architecture.
  • Prepare reports and documentation for senior stakeholders based on past incidents and evaluations.
  • Manage all aspects of IT systems, including hardware, software, networks, and end-user equipment to ensure stable operations.
  • Provide help desk and technical support to on-site and remote employees, including subsidiary IT systems.
  • Conduct user acceptance tests on new or upgraded equipment and perform scheduled system tests.
  • Monitor and manage the security of IT assets, data, network access, and backup systems, and supervise audits to verify security.
  • Ensure the availability of application systems to support business operations and measure IT performance across various domains.
  • Research and recommend improvements to existing infrastructure and manage the IT budget to ensure cost-effectiveness.
  • Maintain inventory of hardware, software, and other IT supplies.
  • Manage employee onboarding and offboarding IT processes.
  • Recommend improvements for the organization's IT systems.
  • Implement enhancements or modifications to IT tools and processes.

Requirements:

  • Degree or Diploma in Computer Science or Information Technology relevant disciplines with at least 1 - 2 years working experience.
  • Good hands-on knowledge in network, Mircosoft Active Directory, Microsoft 365, CCTV and Fortigate firewall.
  • Excellent communication skills, positive attitude, and ability to work effectively in a team.

postedCompany.description: Ban Leong is a brand name in the technology products distribution industry since 1993. Headquartered in Singapore, we distribute a diverse range of I.T accessories, multimedia and data storage products in both commercial and consumer segments. Leveraging on our 27-year brand history, we have successfully re-positioned and strengthened our brand as a name synonymous with innovative, fashionable and user-focused tech-savvy products.
postedCompany.name: BAN LEONG TECHNOLOGIES PTE. LTD.
